summary: Growth Optimization Iteration 443 Testing Complete - All features verified. Completion modal has WhatsApp as PRIMARY button (full-width, larger, pulsing animation), viral nudge text 'This video can go viral — share it now', Download/Create Another as secondary row. Share page has 'More Videos' carousel showing 6 videos with 'People are creating these' heading. Backend GET /api/share/{shareId}/more-videos returns up to 6 videos. Analytics events (share_viewed, cta_clicked, remix_clicked, whatsapp_shared) all tracked via POST /api/growth/event. My Space regression passed with 3 sections, auto-download toggle, notification toggle, and Create Another section.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth optimization features fully tested. Completion modal cannot be triggered in normal browsing (requires live job status transition) - verified via code review. Share page More Videos carousel fetches from GET /api/share/{shareId}/more-videos on mount. Analytics events go to POST /api/growth/event.

tests: WhatsApp button has w-full (full-width), py-3.5 (larger padding), bg-emerald-600
Keyframes defined: @keyframes pulseShare with box-shadow pulse effect
Text: 'This video can go viral — share it now'
Download and Create Another in flex gap-2 row below WhatsApp
Shows 'Takes less than 30 seconds. No credit card required.'
Returns videos array with up to 6 items
Each video has id, title, thumbnailUrl, views
Excludes current share ID from results
Invalid share ID returns empty list (not 404)

notes.completion_modal_testing: Completion modal cannot be triggered in normal browsing - requires live job status transition from PROCESSING to COMPLETED. Verified via code review that all required elements exist with correct data-testids and styling.
notes.more_videos_carousel: MoreVideosCarousel component fetches from GET /api/share/{shareId}/more-videos on mount. If no videos returned, it renders nothing. Currently showing 6 videos from the shares collection.
notes.analytics_tracking: Share page tracks events via trackEvent() function which calls POST /api/growth/event. Events tracked: share_viewed (on mount), cta_clicked, remix_clicked, whatsapp_shared.
